# 002 — Install Base Components

## What to build
Install shadcn/ui base components needed for the bingo app.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] components/ui/button.tsx exists
- [ ] components/ui/input.tsx exists
- [ ] components/ui/dialog.tsx exists
- [ ] components/ui/form.tsx exists
- [ ] components/ui/label.tsx exists
- [ ] components/ui/skeleton.tsx exists
- [ ] All use @/lib/utils for cn()
- [ ] npm run build succeeds
- [ ] react-hook-form, @hookform/resolvers, zod installed (Form deps)

## Technical Spec

### Files to CREATE (generated by shadcn add)
| File | Path | Purpose |
|------|------|---------|
| button.tsx | /components/ui/button.tsx | Button with variants |
| input.tsx | /components/ui/input.tsx | Input component |
| dialog.tsx | /components/ui/dialog.tsx | Dialog/Modal |
| form.tsx | /components/ui/form.tsx | Form with react-hook-form |
| label.tsx | /components/ui/label.tsx | Label component |
| skeleton.tsx | /components/ui/skeleton.tsx | Loading skeleton |

### Files to MODIFY
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| package.json | Radix primitives, react-hook-form, zod added |

### Implementation Details

Run:
npx shadcn@latest add button input dialog form label skeleton

This installs:
- Components into components/ui/
- @radix-ui/react-dialog, @radix-ui/react-label, @radix-ui/react-slot
- react-hook-form, @hookform/resolvers
- zod

Verify imports work:
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger } from "@/components/ui/dialog";
import { Form, FormControl, FormField, FormItem, FormLabel, FormMessage } from "@/components/ui/form";
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";

## Conventions
- Tabs for indentation
- shadcn components are project-owned (can be modified later)
- "use client" only where shadcn marks interactive components

## TDD Sequence
1. Run shadcn add for all components
2. Verify all 6 files exist in components/ui/
3. npm run build
4. Check import paths use @/lib/utils

## Done Definition
- All 6 components in components/ui/
- npm run build succeeds
- All dependencies installed
